26847.title: Ghosts
26847.description: Alison and Mike, a cash-strapped young couple struggling to buy their first home, think their prayers are answered when a distant relative bequeaths them a sprawling estate. However, the old house is haunted by the ghosts of its former inhabitants.

26848.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
26848.description: A special programme focusing on the delicate issue of the `MeToo' movement and a chance for Alan to show off his broadcasting chops. Also featuring a live performance by Alan's very own mixed vocal harmony group, The Quavers.

26849.title: Josh
26849.description: Josh goes on a date with Lily, an old classmate who used to be the `hottest girl in school'. Lily seems curiously attracted to Josh's inadequacies, but will he be able to seal the deal or will her over-protective father get in the way of true lust?

26850.title: Friday Night Dinner
26850.description: Brothers Adam and Jonny are horrified to find Mum and Dad in a hot tub in the garden, drinking champagne. Neighbour Jim arrives to ask them if they can look after Wilson because his sister, who's terrified of dogs, is coming to visit.

26851.title: Semi-Detached
26851.description: Stuart and the family rush to the hospital to be by the bedside of Stuart's dad Willie. Needle-phobic Stu is asked to have a blood test, and a drunk Ted tries to make things better with his wife Kate.

26852.title: Antiques Roadshow
26852.description: Discoveries include a four-leaf clover brooch which brings luck to its owner, as well as a collection of Radiohead memorabilia. A former Concorde pilot reminisces about the celebrity passengers he used to fly across the Atlantic.

26853.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
26853.description: In Hessle, near Hull, Nick, the team, and hundreds of kind volunteers step up to help roofer Darren and his sons. He was married to childhood love Sarah, and is dad to Harvey, step-dad to Mike and adopted dad to Oliver who is severely disabled.
26853.category: Home & Garden, Doe-het-zelf, Bouwen en verbouwen, Kunstnijverheid

26854.title: Friday Night Dinner
26854.description: Brothers Adam and Jonny are horrified to find Mum and Dad in a hot tub in the garden, drinking champagne. Neighbour Jim arrives to ask them if they can look after Wilson because his sister, who's terrified of dogs, is coming to visit.

26855.title: Ghosts

26856.title: Antiques Roadshow
26856.description: Discoveries include a four-leaf clover brooch which brings luck to its owner, as well as a collection of Radiohead memorabilia. A former Concorde pilot reminisces about the celebrity passengers he used to fly across the Atlantic.

26857.title: Call the Midwife
26857.description: A disease outbreak brings back bad memories for Patsy, while Sister Winifred is forced to reconsider her prejudices when dealing with a mother-to-be. Barbara faces a dilemma when Tom asks her to dinner.

26858.title: Call the Midwife
26858.description: The pressures of modern Britain reach Poplar as a hospital secondment and a difficult birth raise moral questions for Sister Julienne. Trixie and Tom help a family breaking apart under the pressure of a son's dreams for the future.

26859.title: Doctors
26859.description: Bear meets the infamous Miranda Evans, and Sid puzzles over his first labour. Emma has to get a fractured family to come together when a graduation day becomes too much.

26860.title: Doctors
26860.description: Miranda arrives at the Mill, impressing everyone, but Valerie has her suspicions, Meanwhile, Rob has to solve the mystery behind a violent attack on a pensioner.

26861.title: Doctors
26861.description: Al is keen to try out his new game app on the team, and Karen proves especially enthusiastic. Emma is challenged when a stabbing leads to an internal police investigation.

26862.title: Doctors
26862.description: Ruhma supports one couple from the start to the end of their pregnancy journey, but must admit that she needs help herself.

26863.title: EastEnders
26863.description: There's an incident at the gym when Linda pushes herself too hard. Iqra supports Mila as she stands up for what she believes, and Kheerat must make a change to keep on Ben's good side.

26864.title: EastEnders
26864.description: Sharon is shocked to hear Linda's secret, Jean convinces Mo to take a chance, and Ben agrees to help Kheerat and his family.

26865.title: EastEnders
26865.description: Mo's big revelation leaves Jean shocked, Phil is touched to be invited to a special event for Bert and Ernie, and Iqra's good deed backfires leaving her guilt-ridden.

26866.title: EastEnders
26866.description: Callum's work leaves Ben feeling uneasy, and Kat finds herself in a frightening situation.

26867.title: Impossible
26867.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

26868.title: Impossible
26868.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

26869.title: Doctor Who
26869.description: Intelligence agents around the world are under attack from alien forces, so MI6 turn to the only people who can help: the Doctor and friends. As they travel the globe looking for answers, attacks come from all sides. Earth's security rests on the team's shoulders, but where will this planet-threatening conspiracy lead them?

26870.title: Father Brown
26870.description: Father Brown struggles to save Sid from himself when he vows vengeance on his former defence barrister.

26877.title: Call the Midwife
26877.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

26878.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
26878.description: Frank and Lu have a mystery to solve when a man with no recollection of who he is or where he came from wanders into their lives.

26879.title: Sanditon
26879.description: Charlotte and Sidney clash again, only for Charlotte to be left confused by a chance encounter. Tensions surrounding Miss Lambe's arrival in Sanditon erupt at Lady Denham's luncheon, and Esther and Edward realise that Clara poses a threat.

26880.title: The Kettering Incident
26880.description: Anna Macy left Kettering when she was just 14, shortly after her best friend disappeared in the forest. When Anna returns 15 years later, the town is struggling to survive.
